RuleSet.Name: src/schemapub/ISchemaPubTablePKey.java
RuleSet.Descr: Java 25 public interface for a $TableName$ primary key object.

GenFile.Name: reallyIFileSchemaPubTablePKeyJava
GenFile.BasePackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$pub/src/main/java
GenFile.SubPackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$pub

RuleSet.GenRule: $reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each declPubColumnGetterSetter )$$declPubRecPKeyEquals$$declPubRecPKeyHashCode$$declPubRecPKeyCompareTo$$reference PrimaryKeyIndex declPubRecPKeyToString$
public $emitPubInterfaceDataType$ get$OptionalOrRequired$$RelationType$$Suffix$();$switch IsToIndexUnique yes declISchemaPubTablePKeyRelationSetter default empty$

public void set$OptionalOrRequired$$RelationType$$Suffix$(I$reference ToTable DefSchemaName$Pub$reference ToTable TableName$ argObj); public void set$OptionalOrRequired$$RelationType$$Suffix$($iterate Columns(first declPubSetArgColumn each declPubCommaSetArgColumn)$);
$reference FromCol reference Column implPubJavaAtomType$ arg$reference FromCol reference Column Name$
$iterate Columns( lone implPubColumnIdAttr first empty each empty empty empty )$
$iterate Columns( lone implPubJavaAtomType first empty each empty empty empty )$
$iterate Columns( lone implPubJavaOptAtomType first empty each empty empty empty )$
$iterate Columns( lone implPubJavaReqAtomType first empty each empty empty empty )$
public int getRequiredRevision(); public void setRequiredRevision( int value );
public int getClassCode(); public void setClassCode( int value );
$switch IsNullable yes declPubOptGetter default declPubReqGetter$$switch IsNullable yes declPubOptSetter default declPubReqSetter$

$switch BaseModelAtomClass BlobDef declPubReqBlobGetter BoolDef declPubReqBoolGetter EnumDef declPubReqEnumGetter Id16Gen declPubReqInt16Getter Id32Gen declPubReqInt32Getter Id64Gen declPubReqInt64Getter Int16Def declPubReqInt16Getter Int32Def declPubReqInt32Getter Int64Def declPubReqInt64Getter UInt16Def declPubReqUInt16Getter UInt32Def declPubReqUInt32Getter UInt64Def declPubReqUInt64Getter FloatDef declPubReqFloatGetter DoubleDef declPubReqDoubleGetter NumberDef declPubReqNumberGetter DateDef declPubReqDateGetter TimeDef declPubReqTimeGetter TimestampDef declPubReqTimestampGetter TZDateDef declPubReqTZDateGetter TZTimeDef declPubReqTZTimeGetter TZTimestampDef declPubReqTZTimestampGetter DbKeyHash128Gen declPubReqDbKeyHash128Getter DbKeyHash160Gen declPubReqDbKeyHash160Getter DbKeyHash224Gen declPubReqDbKeyHash224Getter DbKeyHash256Gen declPubReqDbKeyHash256Getter DbKeyHash384Gen declPubReqDbKeyHash384Getter DbKeyHash512Gen declPubReqDbKeyHash512Getter DbKeyHash128Def declPubReqDbKeyHash128Getter DbKeyHash160Def declPubReqDbKeyHash160Getter DbKeyHash224Def declPubReqDbKeyHash224Getter DbKeyHash256Def declPubReqDbKeyHash256Getter DbKeyHash384Def declPubReqDbKeyHash384Getter DbKeyHash512Def declPubReqDbKeyHash512Getter Uuid6Gen declPubReqUuid6Getter Uuid6Def declPubReqUuid6Getter UuidGen declPubReqUuidGetter UuidDef declPubReqUuidGetter StringDef declPubReqStringGetter TokenDef declPubReqTokenGetter NmTokenDef declPubReqNmTokenGetter NmTokensDef declPubReqNmTokensGetter TextDef declPubReqTextGetter default ErrorUnrecognizedBaseModelAtomClass$

$switch BaseModelAtomClass BlobDef declPubOptBlobGetter BoolDef declPubOptBoolGetter EnumDef declPubOptEnumGetter Id16Gen declPubOptInt16Getter Id32Gen declPubOptInt32Getter Id64Gen declPubOptInt64Getter Int16Def declPubOptInt16Getter Int32Def declPubOptInt32Getter Int64Def declPubOptInt64Getter UInt16Def declPubOptUInt16Getter UInt32Def declPubOptUInt32Getter UInt64Def declPubOptUInt64Getter FloatDef declPubOptFloatGetter DoubleDef declPubOptDoubleGetter NumberDef declPubOptNumberGetter DateDef declPubOptDateGetter TimeDef declPubOptTimeGetter TimestampDef declPubOptTimestampGetter TZDateDef declPubOptTZDateGetter TZTimeDef declPubOptTZTimeGetter TZTimestampDef declPubOptTZTimestampGetter DbKeyHash128Gen declPubOptDbKeyHash128Getter DbKeyHash160Gen declPubOptDbKeyHash160Getter DbKeyHash224Gen declPubOptDbKeyHash224Getter DbKeyHash256Gen declPubOptDbKeyHash256Getter DbKeyHash384Gen declPubOptDbKeyHash384Getter DbKeyHash512Gen declPubOptDbKeyHash512Getter DbKeyHash128Def declPubOptDbKeyHash128Getter DbKeyHash160Def declPubOptDbKeyHash160Getter DbKeyHash224Def declPubOptDbKeyHash224Getter DbKeyHash256Def declPubOptDbKeyHash256Getter DbKeyHash384Def declPubOptDbKeyHash384Getter DbKeyHash512Def declPubOptDbKeyHash512Getter Uuid6Gen declPubOptUuid6Getter Uuid6Def declPubOptUuid6Getter UuidGen declPubOptUuidGetter UuidDef declPubOptUuidGetter StringDef declPubOptStringGetter TokenDef declPubOptTokenGetter NmTokenDef declPubOptNmTokenGetter NmTokensDef declPubOptNmTokensGetter TextDef declPubOptTextGetter default ErrorUnrecognizedBaseModelAtomClass$

$switch BaseModelAtomClass BlobDef declPubReqBlobSetter BoolDef declPubReqBoolSetter EnumDef declPubReqEnumSetter Id16Gen declPubReqInt16Setter Id32Gen declPubReqInt32Setter Id64Gen declPubReqInt64Setter Int16Def declPubReqInt16Setter Int32Def declPubReqInt32Setter Int64Def declPubReqInt64Setter UInt16Def declPubReqUInt16Setter UInt32Def declPubReqUInt32Setter UInt64Def declPubReqUInt64Setter FloatDef declPubReqFloatSetter DoubleDef declPubReqDoubleSetter NumberDef declPubReqNumberSetter DateDef declPubReqDateSetter TimeDef declPubReqTimeSetter TimestampDef declPubReqTimestampSetter TZDateDef declPubReqTZDateSetter TZTimeDef declPubReqTZTimeSetter TZTimestampDef declPubReqTZTimestampSetter DbKeyHash128Gen declPubReqDbKeyHash128Setter DbKeyHash160Gen declPubReqDbKeyHash160Setter DbKeyHash224Gen declPubReqDbKeyHash224Setter DbKeyHash256Gen declPubReqDbKeyHash256Setter DbKeyHash384Gen declPubReqDbKeyHash384Setter DbKeyHash512Gen declPubReqDbKeyHash512Setter DbKeyHash128Def declPubReqDbKeyHash128Setter DbKeyHash160Def declPubReqDbKeyHash160Setter DbKeyHash224Def declPubReqDbKeyHash224Setter DbKeyHash256Def declPubReqDbKeyHash256Setter DbKeyHash384Def declPubReqDbKeyHash384Setter DbKeyHash512Def declPubReqDbKeyHash512Setter Uuid6Gen declPubReqUuid6Setter Uuid6Def declPubReqUuid6Setter UuidGen declPubReqUuidSetter UuidDef declPubReqUuidSetter StringDef declPubReqStringSetter TokenDef declPubReqTokenSetter NmTokenDef declPubReqNmTokenSetter NmTokensDef declPubReqNmTokensSetter TextDef declPubReqTextSetter default ErrorUnrecognizedBaseModelAtomClass$

$switch BaseModelAtomClass BlobDef declPubOptBlobSetter BoolDef declPubOptBoolSetter EnumDef declPubOptEnumSetter Id16Gen declPubOptInt16Setter Id32Gen declPubOptInt32Setter Id64Gen declPubOptInt64Setter Int16Def declPubOptInt16Setter Int32Def declPubOptInt32Setter Int64Def declPubOptInt64Setter UInt16Def declPubOptUInt16Setter UInt32Def declPubOptUInt32Setter UInt64Def declPubOptUInt64Setter FloatDef declPubOptFloatSetter DoubleDef declPubOptDoubleSetter NumberDef declPubOptNumberSetter DateDef declPubOptDateSetter TimeDef declPubOptTimeSetter TimestampDef declPubOptTimestampSetter TZDateDef declPubOptTZDateSetter TZTimeDef declPubOptTZTimeSetter TZTimestampDef declPubOptTZTimestampSetter DbKeyHash128Gen declPubOptDbKeyHash128Setter DbKeyHash160Gen declPubOptDbKeyHash160Setter DbKeyHash224Gen declPubOptDbKeyHash224Setter DbKeyHash256Gen declPubOptDbKeyHash256Setter DbKeyHash384Gen declPubOptDbKeyHash384Setter DbKeyHash512Gen declPubOptDbKeyHash512Setter DbKeyHash128Def declPubOptDbKeyHash128Setter DbKeyHash160Def declPubOptDbKeyHash160Setter DbKeyHash224Def declPubOptDbKeyHash224Setter DbKeyHash256Def declPubOptDbKeyHash256Setter DbKeyHash384Def declPubOptDbKeyHash384Setter DbKeyHash512Def declPubOptDbKeyHash512Setter Uuid6Gen declPubOptUuid6Setter Uuid6Def declPubOptUuid6Setter UuidGen declPubOptUuidSetter UuidDef declPubOptUuidSetter StringDef declPubOptStringSetter TokenDef declPubOptTokenSetter NmTokenDef declPubOptNmTokenSetter NmTokensDef declPubOptNmTokensSetter TextDef declPubOptTextSetter default ErrorUnrecognizedBaseModelAtomClass$

$switch BaseModelAtomClass BlobDef declPubBlobMinValue BoolDef declPubBoolMinValue EnumDef declPubEnumMinValue Id16Gen declPubInt16MinValue Id32Gen declPubInt32MinValue Id64Gen declPubInt64MinValue Int16Def declPubInt16MinValue Int32Def declPubInt32MinValue Int64Def declPubInt64MinValue UInt16Def declPubUInt16MinValue UInt32Def declPubUInt32MinValue UInt64Def declPubUInt64MinValue FloatDef declPubFloatMinValue DoubleDef declPubDoubleMinValue NumberDef declPubNumberMinValue DateDef declPubDateMinValue TimeDef declPubTimeMinValue TimestampDef declPubTimestampMinValue TZDateDef declPubTZDateMinValue TZTimeDef declPubTZTimeMinValue TZTimestampDef declPubTZTimestampMinValue DbKeyHash128Gen empty DbKeyHash160Gen empty DbKeyHash224Gen empty DbKeyHash256Gen empty DbKeyHash384Gen empty DbKeyHash512Gen empty DbKeyHash128Def empty DbKeyHash160Def empty DbKeyHash224Def empty DbKeyHash256Def empty DbKeyHash384Def empty DbKeyHash512Def empty Uuid6Gen empty Uuid6Def empty UuidGen declPubUuidMinValue UuidDef declPubUuidMinValue StringDef declPubStringMinValue TokenDef declPubTokenMinValue NmTokenDef declPubNmTokenMinValue NmTokensDef declPubNmTokensMinValue TextDef declPubTextMinValue default ErrorUnrecognizedBaseModelAtomClass$

$switch BaseModelAtomClass BlobDef declPubBlobMaxValue BoolDef declPubBoolMaxValue EnumDef declPubEnumMaxValue Id16Gen declPubInt16MaxValue Id32Gen declPubInt32MaxValue Id64Gen declPubInt64MaxValue Int16Def declPubInt16MaxValue Int32Def declPubInt32MaxValue Int64Def declPubInt64MaxValue UInt16Def declPubUInt16MaxValue UInt32Def declPubUInt32MaxValue UInt64Def declPubUInt64MaxValue FloatDef declPubFloatMaxValue DoubleDef declPubDoubleMaxValue NumberDef declPubNumberMaxValue DateDef declPubDateMaxValue TimeDef declPubTimeMaxValue TimestampDef declPubTimestampMaxValue TZDateDef declPubTZDateMaxValue TZTimeDef declPubTZTimeMaxValue TZTimestampDef declPubTZTimestampMaxValue DbKeyHash128Gen empty DbKeyHash160Gen empty DbKeyHash224Gen empty DbKeyHash256Gen empty DbKeyHash384Gen empty DbKeyHash512Gen empty DbKeyHash128Def empty DbKeyHash160Def empty DbKeyHash224Def empty DbKeyHash256Def empty DbKeyHash384Def empty DbKeyHash512Def empty Uuid6Gen empty Uuid6Def empty UuidGen declPubUuidMaxValue UuidDef declPubUuidMaxValue StringDef declPubStringMaxValue TokenDef declPubTokenMaxValue NmTokenDef declPubNmTokenMaxValue NmTokensDef declPubNmTokensMaxValue TextDef declPubTextMaxValue default ErrorUnrecognizedBaseModelAtomClass$

$switch BaseModelAtomClass BlobDef declPubBlobInitValue BoolDef declPubBoolInitValue EnumDef declPubEnumInitValue Id16Gen declPubInt16InitValue Id32Gen declPubInt32InitValue Id64Gen declPubInt64InitValue Int16Def declPubInt16InitValue Int32Def declPubInt32InitValue Int64Def declPubInt64InitValue UInt16Def declPubUInt16InitValue UInt32Def declPubUInt32InitValue UInt64Def declPubUInt64InitValue FloatDef declPubFloatInitValue DoubleDef declPubDoubleInitValue NumberDef declPubNumberInitValue DateDef declPubDateInitValue TimeDef declPubTimeInitValue TimestampDef declPubTimestampInitValue TZDateDef declPubTZDateInitValue TZTimeDef declPubTZTimeInitValue TZTimestampDef declPubTZTimestampInitValue DbKeyHash128Gen declPubDbKeyHash128InitValue DbKeyHash160Gen declPubDbKeyHash160InitValue DbKeyHash224Gen declPubDbKeyHash224InitValue DbKeyHash256Gen declPubDbKeyHash256InitValue DbKeyHash384Gen declPubDbKeyHash384InitValue DbKeyHash512Gen declPubDbKeyHash512InitValue DbKeyHash128Def declPubDbKeyHash128InitValue DbKeyHash160Def declPubDbKeyHash160InitValue DbKeyHash224Def declPubDbKeyHash224InitValue DbKeyHash256Def declPubDbKeyHash256InitValue DbKeyHash384Def declPubDbKeyHash384InitValue DbKeyHash512Def declPubDbKeyHash512InitValue Uuid6Gen declPubUuid6InitValue Uuid6Def declPubUuid6InitValue UuidGen declPubUuidInitValue UuidDef declPubUuidInitValue StringDef declPubStringInitValue TokenDef declPubTokenInitValue NmTokenDef declPubNmTokenInitValue NmTokensDef declPubNmTokensInitValue TextDef declPubTextInitValue default ErrorUnrecognizedBaseModelAtomClass$
public final static boolean $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = $switch InitValue yes true default false$;

public static final I$reference DataType EffSchemaName$PubSchema.$reference DataType Name$ $upper Name$_MIN_VALUE = I$reference DataType EffSchemaName$PubSchema.$reference DataType Name$.$reference DataType iterate Tag( first declPubEnumMinValueEmitTagName each empty )$;

public static final I$reference DataType EffSchemaName$PubSchema.$reference DataType Name$ $upper Name$_MAX_VALUE = I$reference DataType EffSchemaName$PubSchema.$reference DataType Name$.$reference DataType iterate Tag( last declPubEnumMaxValueEmitTagName each empty )$;

public static final I$reference DataType EffSchemaName$PubSchema.$reference DataType Name$ $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = $switch IsNullable yes declPubEnumInitValueNull default declPubEnumInitValueAlways$;
I$reference DataType EffSchemaName$PubSchema.$reference DataType Name$.$reference DataType iterate Tag( first declPubEnumInitValueUseFirstTagName each empty )$
public I$reference DataType EffSchemaName$PubSchema.$reference DataType Name$ get$implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$();
public void set$implPubColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$( I$reference DataType EffSchemaName$PubSchema.$reference DataType Name$ value );
public I$reference DataType EffSchemaName$PubSchema.$reference DataType Name$ get$implPubColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$();
public void set$implPubColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$( I$reference DataType EffSchemaName$PubSchema.$reference DataType Name$ value );
public static final short $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = (short)$switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero$;
$switch BaseModelAtomClass Int64Def emitPubLForLong Id64Gen emitPubLForLong UInt64Def emitPubLForLong UInt32Def emitPubLForLong default empty$
public static final int $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = $switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero$;
public static final long $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = $switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero$L;
public static final int $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = $switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero$;
public static final long $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = $switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero$L;
public static final BigDecimal $upper Name$_MIN_VALUE = CFLibBigDecimalUtil.parse( "$EffSchemaName$Pub.$TableName$.$Name$", "$EffSchemaName$Pub.$TableName$.$Name$", 19, 0, "$MinValue$" );
public static final BigDecimal $upper Name$_MAX_VALUE = CFLibBigDecimalUtil.parse( "$EffSchemaName$Pub.$TableName$.$Name$", "$EffSchemaName$Pub.$TableName$.$Name$", 19, 0, "$MaxValue$" );

public static final BigDecimal $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = CFLibBigDecimalUtil.parse( "$EffSchemaName$Pub.$TableName$.$Name$", "$EffSchemaName$Pub.$TableName$.$Name$", 19, 0, "$switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero$" );
public static final float $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = (float)$switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero$;
public static final double $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = $switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero$;

public static final BigDecimal $upper Name$_MIN_VALUE = CFLibBigDecimalUtil.parse( "$EffSchemaName$Pub.$TableName$.$Name$", "$EffSchemaName$Pub.$TableName$.$Name$", $Digits$, $Precis$, "$MinValue$" );

public static final BigDecimal $upper Name$_MAX_VALUE = CFLibBigDecimalUtil.parse( "$EffSchemaName$Pub.$TableName$.$Name$", "$EffSchemaName$.$TableName$Pub.$Name$", $Digits$, $Precis$, "$MaxValue$" );

public static final BigDecimal $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = CFLibBigDecimalUtil.parse( "$EffSchemaName$Pub.$TableName$.$Name$", "$EffSchemaName$Pub.$TableName$.$Name$", $Digits$, $Precis$, "$InitValue$" );
public static final LocalDate $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = CFLib.getUTCLocalDate( 1970, 0, 1, 0, 0, 0 );
public static final LocalTime $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = CFLibXmlUtil.parseTime("00:00:00");

public static final String S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = "$switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero128bits$"; public static final CFLibDbKeyHash128 $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = CFLibDbKeyHash128.fromHex( S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE );

public static final String S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = "$switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero160bits$"; public static final CFLibDbKeyHash160 $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = CFLibDbKeyHash160.fromHex( S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE );

public static final String S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = "$switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero224bits$"; public static final CFLibDbKeyHash224 $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = CFLibDbKeyHash224.fromHex( S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE );

public static final String S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = "$switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero256bits$"; public static final CFLibDbKeyHash256 $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = CFLibDbKeyHash256.fromHex( S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE );

public static final String S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = "$switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero384bits$"; public static final CFLibDbKeyHash384 $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = CFLibDbKeyHash384.fromHex( S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE );

public static final String S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = "$switch HasInitValue yes InitValue default Zero512bits$"; public static final CFLibDbKeyHash512 $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = CFLibDbKeyHash512.fromHex( S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE );
public static final String S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = "$InitValue$"; public static final CFLibUuid6 $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = CFLibUuid6.fromString( S_$upper Name$_INIT_VALUE );
public static final UUID $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = UUID.fromString( "$InitValue$" );
public static final String $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = new String( "$InitValue$" );
public static final String $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = new String( "$InitValue$" );
public static final String $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = new String( "$InitValue$" );
public static final String $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = new String( "$InitValue$" );
public static final String $upper Name$_INIT_VALUE = new String( "$InitValue$" );
